seoTitle: Use ClickUp as a Real Estate CRM: Setup Guide
metaDescription: Turn ClickUp into a real estate CRM with property fields, deal pipeline boards, viewing task automations, and dashboards for tracking commission.
intro: Real estate agents juggle listings, buyer requirements, and closing timelines all at once, and ClickUp can be shaped into a lightweight CRM to manage that flow. This guide covers setting up a real estate Space, tracking budgets and location tags with custom fields, and automating viewing checklists as deals progress. It closes with dashboard widgets for monitoring sales value and commission forecasts.

steps.heading: Set up a Real Estate CRM Space
steps.body: Create a dedicated Space to hold buyer, seller, and property records separate from other work.

steps.heading: Add property-specific custom fields
steps.body: Track budgets, location tags, and commission percentages using custom fields on each listing or lead.

steps.heading: Automate deal-stage tasks
steps.body: Set up Workspace Rules to generate viewing checklists or document tasks automatically as a deal advances.

steps.heading: Build a deal pipeline board
steps.body: Use a Kanban-style board grouped by deal stage to see where every property or lead currently sits.

steps.heading: Track inventory in a table view
steps.body: Add a table view to keep a full log of live property listings alongside their key details.

steps.heading: Monitor sales with dashboard widgets
steps.body: Add calculation and forecasting widgets to a shared dashboard to track active sales value and commission.

faq.question: Can ClickUp track buyer requirements alongside listings?
faq.answer: Yes, custom fields let you capture buyer requirements and contact details next to your property records.

faq.question: How do I see my sales pipeline at a glance?
faq.answer: A Kanban board grouped by deal closure stage gives you a visual view of where each property stands.

faq.question: Can I automate paperwork tasks for new listings?
faq.answer: Workspace Rules can trigger viewing checklists or document task groups automatically as deals move forward.

faq.question: Does ClickUp calculate my commission forecasts?
faq.answer: You can add calculation footer rows and dashboard widgets to track cumulative contract values and forecast commission.
